channel.title: Semiotica
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Semiotica

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-frontmatter261

item.title: The semiotic roots of worldviews: logic, epistemology, and contemporary comparisons
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2023-0170

item.title: Concept lattice formalisms of Hébert’s “semic analysis” and “analysis by classification”
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2023-0037

item.title: AI recommendations’ impact on individual and social practices of Generation Z on social media: a comparative analysis between Estonia, Italy, and the Netherlands
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2023-0089

item.title: Varieties and transformations in emic interpretations of Catholic rituals in contemporary Podhale: a semiotic perspective on religious change
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2023-0147

item.title: The challenge of dissecting the frog: cartoonists analyze their creative process
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2023-0078

item.title: A genealogy of poetry
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2023-0040

item.title: Tracing fashion transformations: a comprehensive visual analysis of fashion magazine covers
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2022-0052

item.title: A study in scarlet: cultural memory of the tropes related to the color red, female countenance, and onstage makeup in the Sinophone world
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2023-0186

item.title: La sémiotique qui étonne toujours: le bilan de l’année 2023
item.description: Article by Ekaterina Velmezova, Richard Rosenbaum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0186
